tasks.description: Implement the core API Gateway structure, define routing for user and payment services, and integrate initial rate-limiting logic.
Integrate and configure JWT authentication for API requests, including token validation and user context extraction.
Set up the necessary cloud infrastructure (e.g., load balancers, auto-scaling groups, necessary networking) and CI/CD pipelines for API Gateway deployment.
Conduct a comprehensive security review of the API Gateway implementation (rate limiting, JWT auth, routing) and apply necessary hardening measures.
Write comprehensive technical documentation for the API Gateway, covering routing, authentication (JWT), rate limiting, and general usage guidelines.

tasks.task_name: Deploy API Gateway to Staging/Production & Validate
tasks.description: Perform the initial deployment of the API Gateway using the automated pipelines, followed by comprehensive integration and smoke testing to ensure full functionality.
